title: A Hidden Plan Advances
description: On pages 18–19, this part focuses on a hidden plan advances, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Hidden Plan Advances. Crocodile uses Rain Dinners and Baroque Works to capture his enemies and reveal the shape of Operation Utopia. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If that's what you want too, then this should go a lot more smoothly.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is my first time seeing a flying man.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But I wonder if you're stronger than me...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A member of the organization threatening our kingdom...?

summary: This part develops a hidden plan advances and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
